title: Build a tiny wooden house
goal: Build a tiny house out of wooden blocks (planks or logs) near where you spawned. FIRST gather and craft enough material before you start placing — a small house needs roughly 30 wooden blocks, so chop enough logs (about 8) and craft them into planks first so you do not run out partway. THEN build: a finished tiny house must fully ENCLOSE a space at least 3x3 on the ground, with walls at least 2 blocks tall on every side AND a roof covering the top (leaving a 1-block doorway is fine). A few blocks on the ground is NOT a house. Only call stop() once the walls AND the roof are actually complete.
rationale: Open-ended building task (human-reviewed). The bot must gather wood, craft planks, and place many blocks into a coherent small structure, deciding for itself when the build is done. Tests long-horizon planning, spatial placement, and self-terminated completion.
review_note: Human-reviewed: judge whether the placed blocks form a small, mostly-enclosed wooden house (walls + a roof). The scorecard's build summary lists what was placed.
